prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约57673→55637→54889→65638，2025年较2024年后移约10749名，出现明显位次下滑；近3年累计后移约10001名，2025年基 准约65638名；该校在四川省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2022年128人、2023年136人、2024年152人、2025年186人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划182人 ，较2025年减少4人，小幅缩招约2.15%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第135名，近年排名稳定在135–140 区间，属于211高校中中等偏上层次；2022年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及宿舍改造未全覆盖、南区条件差等生活设施问题；抖音热度排名第58（较热），综合热 度约55万，在211高校中处于中等偏上关注水平；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中该校未获A-及以上评级，优势学科以农学、医学、师范为特色，但 缺乏顶尖学科支撑，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业结构匹配；四川省20 26年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增长约15.6%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于新疆，距四川较远，跨省就读的 地域偏好对四川考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在四川招生占比未见显著变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划小幅缩招、四川省考生总数明 显增加以及地域偏远等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次在2025年基准上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约64991名，区间64491–65491名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 57673 → 55637 → 54889 → 65638. In 2025, it shifted back by about 10749 places compared to 2024, showing a significant decline; over the past 3 years, it has cumulatively shifted back by about 10001 places, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 65638. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Sichuan: 128 in 2022, 136 in 2023, 152 in 2024, 186 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 182, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.15%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 135th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 135–140 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier among 211 universities; in 2022, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving issues such as incomplete dormitory renovation and poor conditions in the southern area; its Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating a medium-to-high level of attention among 211 universities; no significant enrollment gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not receive an A- or above rating, with advantageous disciplines characterized by agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, but lacking top-tier disciplines, which limits its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, matching the structure of the university's Physics Category enrollment majors; the total number of examinees in Sichuan in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xinjiang, far from Sichuan, and the geographical preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on Sichuan students' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan has not shown significant changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the notable increase in the number of examinees in Sichuan, and the remote geographical location, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings continuing to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 64991, with a range of 64491–65491.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 64991, with a range of 64491–65491. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Top Innovation Class, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 64000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 65000) are advised to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 11442 → 9916 → 9153 → 8603, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensifying competition), with a cumulative upward shift of about 2839 positions over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8603. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was: 22 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 18 in 2025, with significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 6 from 2025, a substantial expansion of about 33.33%, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 135th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 135–140 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier among 211 universities; its reputation evaluation in 2022 was somewhat negative, mainly related to dormitory conditions; its Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating an upper-middle level of attention among 211 universities; no obvious admission cutoff gaps have been observed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not receive an A- or higher rating, with advantageous disciplines featuring agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, while History Category enrollment majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English Teacher Training, and Business Administration, which have a general correlation with the university's strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended but shows clear differentiation; Teacher Training/Education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Sichuan in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from 2025 (about 463,000), significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xinjiang, far from Sichuan, and the geographical preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on Sichuan examinees' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan has not shown significant changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in historical rankings, the substantial 33% expansion in the 2026 plan, the significant increase in the number of examinees in Sichuan, and the remote geographical location, the mitigating effect of expansion on rankings and the pushing effect of increased examinees on rankings offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 History Category ranking will slightly shift downward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10374, with a range of 9874–10874.
